lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੂਹੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੧ ਘਰੁ ੬ ॥
lines.translit: soohee mahalaa 1 ghar 6 |
lines.english: Soohee, First Mehl, Sixth House:

lines.gurmukhi: ਉਜਲੁ ਕੈਹਾ ਚਿਲਕਣਾ ਘੋਟਿਮ ਕਾਲੜੀ ਮਸੁ ॥
lines.translit: aujal kaihaa chilakanaa ghottim kaalarree mas |
lines.english: Bronze is bright and shiny, but when it is rubbed, its blackness appears.

lines.gurmukhi: ਧੋਤਿਆ ਜੂਠਿ ਨ ਉਤਰੈ ਜੇ ਸਉ ਧੋਵਾ ਤਿਸੁ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: dhotiaa jootth na utarai je sau dhovaa tis |1|
lines.english: Washing it, its impurity is not removed, even if it is washed a hundred times. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਜਣ ਸੇਈ ਨਾਲਿ ਮੈ ਚਲਦਿਆ ਨਾਲਿ ਚਲੰਨੑਿ ॥
lines.translit: sajan seee naal mai chaladiaa naal chalana |
lines.english: They alone are my friends, who travel along with me;

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਥੈ ਲੇਖਾ ਮੰਗੀਐ ਤਿਥੈ ਖੜੇ ਦਿਸੰਨਿ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jithai lekhaa mangeeai tithai kharre disan |1| rahaau |
lines.english: and in that place, where the accounts are called for, they appear standing with me. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੋਠੇ ਮੰਡਪ ਮਾੜੀਆ ਪਾਸਹੁ ਚਿਤਵੀਆਹਾ ॥
lines.translit: kotthe manddap maarreea paasahu chitaveeaahaa |
lines.english: There are houses, mansions and tall buildings, painted on all sides;

lines.gurmukhi: ਢਠੀਆ ਕੰਮਿ ਨ ਆਵਨੑੀ ਵਿਚਹੁ ਸਖਣੀਆਹਾ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: dtattheea kam na aavanaee vichahu sakhaneeaahaa |2|
lines.english: but they are empty within, and they crumble like useless ruins. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਗਾ ਬਗੇ ਕਪੜੇ ਤੀਰਥ ਮੰਝਿ ਵਸੰਨੑਿ ॥
lines.translit: bagaa bage kaparre teerath manjh vasana |
lines.english: The herons in their white feathers dwell in the sacred shrines of pilgrimage.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿੰਮਲ ਰੁਖੁ ਸਰੀਰੁ ਮੈ ਮੈਜਨ ਦੇਖਿ ਭੁਲੰਨੑਿ ॥
lines.translit: sinmal rukh sareer mai maijan dekh bhulana |
lines.english: My body is like the simmal tree; seeing me, other people are fooled.

lines.gurmukhi: ਘੁਟਿ ਘੁਟਿ ਜੀਆ ਖਾਵਣੇ ਬਗੇ ਨਾ ਕਹੀਅਨੑਿ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: ghutt ghutt jeea khaavane bage naa kaheeana |3|
lines.english: They tear apart and eat the living beings, and so they are not called white. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਧੁਲੈ ਭਾਰੁ ਉਠਾਇਆ ਡੂਗਰ ਵਾਟ ਬਹੁਤੁ ॥
lines.translit: andhulai bhaar utthaaeaa ddoogar vaatt bahut |
lines.english: The blind man is carrying such a heavy load, and his journey through the mountains is so long.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੇ ਫਲ ਕੰਮਿ ਨ ਆਵਨੑੀ ਤੇ ਗੁਣ ਮੈ ਤਨਿ ਹੰਨੑਿ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: se fal kam na aavanaee te gun mai tan hana |4|
lines.english: Its fruits are useless - just like the qualities of my body. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਾਕਰੀਆ ਚੰਗਿਆਈਆ ਅਵਰ ਸਿਆਣਪ ਕਿਤੁ ॥
lines.translit: chaakareea changiaaeea avar siaanap kit |
lines.english: What good does it do to serve, and be good, and be clever?

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਖੀ ਲੋੜੀ ਨਾ ਲਹਾ ਹਉ ਚੜਿ ਲੰਘਾ ਕਿਤੁ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: akhee lorree naa lahaa hau charr langhaa kit |5|
lines.english: My eyes can see, but I cannot find the Way. How can I climb up and cross over the mountain? ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੂਹੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: soohee mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Soohee, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮੁ ਸਮਾਲਿ ਤੂੰ ਬਧਾ ਛੁਟਹਿ ਜਿਤੁ ॥੬॥੧॥੩॥
lines.translit: naanak naam samaal toon badhaa chhutteh jit |6|1|3|
lines.english: O Nanak, contemplate the Naam, the Name of the Lord, and you shall be released from bondage. ||6||1||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਪ ਤਪ ਕਾ ਬੰਧੁ ਬੇੜੁਲਾ ਜਿਤੁ ਲੰਘਹਿ ਵਹੇਲਾ ॥
lines.translit: jap tap kaa bandh berrulaa jit langheh vahelaa |
lines.english: Build the raft of meditation and self-discipline, to carry you across the river.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾ ਸਰਵਰੁ ਨਾ ਊਛਲੈ ਐਸਾ ਪੰਥੁ ਸੁਹੇਲਾ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naa saravar naa aoochhalai aisaa panth suhelaa |1|
lines.english: There will be no ocean, and no rising tides to stop you; this is how comfortable your path shall be. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੇਰਾ ਏਕੋ ਨਾਮੁ ਮੰਜੀਠੜਾ ਰਤਾ ਮੇਰਾ ਚੋਲਾ ਸਦ ਰੰਗ ਢੋਲਾ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: teraa eko naam manjeettharraa rataa meraa cholaa sad rang dtolaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Your Name alone is the color, in which the robe of my body is dyed. This color is permanent, O my Beloved. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੇ ਗੁਣ ਹੋਵਹਿ ਗੰਠੜੀਐ ਮੇਲੇਗਾ ਸੋਈ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: je gun hoveh ganttharreeai melegaa soee |2|
lines.english: If they have virtue in their pack, the Lord will unite them with Himself. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਜਨ ਚਲੇ ਪਿਆਰਿਆ ਕਿਉ ਮੇਲਾ ਹੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: saajan chale piaariaa kiau melaa hoee |
lines.english: My beloved friends have departed; how will they meet the Lord?

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਵਾ ਗਉਣੁ ਨਿਵਾਰਿਆ ਹੈ ਸਾਚਾ ਸੋਈ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: aavaa gaun nivaariaa hai saachaa soee |3|
lines.english: The True Lord brings their comings and goings to an end. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਿਲਿਆ ਹੋਇ ਨ ਵੀਛੁੜੈ ਜੇ ਮਿਲਿਆ ਹੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: miliaa hoe na veechhurrai je miliaa hoee |
lines.english: Once united with Him, they will not be separated again, if they are truly united.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਬਚਨੀ ਫਲੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਸਹ ਕੇ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤ ਬੋਲਾ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: gur bachanee fal paaeaa seh ke amrit bolaa |4|
lines.english: Following the Word of the Guru's Teachings, she receives the fruits of her reward, the Ambrosial Words of the Lord. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉਮੈ ਮਾਰਿ ਨਿਵਾਰਿਆ ਸੀਤਾ ਹੈ ਚੋਲਾ ॥
lines.translit: haumai maar nivaariaa seetaa hai cholaa |
lines.english: One who subdues and eradicates egotism, sews the robe of devotion.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕੁ ਕਹੈ ਸਹੇਲੀਹੋ ਸਹੁ ਖਰਾ ਪਿਆਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: naanak kahai saheleeho sahu kharaa piaaraa |
lines.english: Says Nanak, O soul-brides, our Husband Lord is so dear!

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਮ ਸਹ ਕੇਰੀਆ ਦਾਸੀਆ ਸਾਚਾ ਖਸਮੁ ਹਮਾਰਾ ॥੫॥੨॥੪॥
lines.translit: ham seh kereea daaseea saachaa khasam hamaaraa |5|2|4|
lines.english: We are the servants, the hand-maidens of the Lord; He is our True Lord and Master. ||5||2||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੂਖੀ ਕਰੈ ਪਸਾਉ ਦੂਖ ਵਿਸਾਰਸੀ ॥
lines.translit: sookhee karai pasaau dookh visaarasee |
lines.english: They are blessed with peace, and their pains are forgotten.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਹਸਾ ਮੂਲੇ ਨਾਹਿ ਸਰਪਰ ਤਾਰਸੀ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: sahasaa moole naeh sarapar taarasee |1|
lines.english: He will undoubtedly, certainly save them. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੂਹੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: soohee mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Soohee, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨ ਕਉ ਭਾਂਡੈ ਭਾਉ ਤਿਨਾ ਸਵਾਰਸੀ ॥
lines.translit: jin kau bhaanddai bhaau tinaa savaarasee |
lines.english: Those whose minds are filled with love of the Lord, are blessed and exalted.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਨੑਾ ਮਿਲਿਆ ਗੁਰੁ ਆਇ ਜਿਨ ਕਉ ਲੀਖਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: tinaa miliaa gur aae jin kau leekhiaa |
lines.english: The Guru comes to meet those whose destiny is so pre-ordained.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤੁ ਹਰਿ ਕਾ ਨਾਉ ਦੇਵੈ ਦੀਖਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: amrit har kaa naau devai deekhiaa |
lines.english: He blesses them with the Teachings of the Ambrosial Name of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਕਉ ਮਹਲੁ ਹਜੂਰਿ ਦੂਜੇ ਨਿਵੈ ਕਿਸੁ ॥
lines.translit: jaa kau mehal hajoor dooje nivai kis |
lines.english: And one who lives in the Mansion of the Lord's Presence, why should he bow down to any other?

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਾਲਹਿ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਭਾਇ ਭਵਹਿ ਨ ਭੀਖਿਆ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: chaaleh satigur bhaae bhaveh na bheekhiaa |2|
lines.english: Those who walk in the Will of the True Guru, never wander begging. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਰਿ ਦਰਵਾਣੀ ਨਾਹਿ ਮੂਲੇ ਪੁਛ ਤਿਸੁ ॥
lines.translit: dar daravaanee naeh moole puchh tis |
lines.english: The gate-keeper at the Lord's Gate shall not stop him to ask any questions.

lines.gurmukhi: ਛੁਟੈ ਤਾ ਕੈ ਬੋਲਿ ਸਾਹਿਬ ਨਦਰਿ ਜਿਸੁ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: chhuttai taa kai bol saahib nadar jis |3|
lines.english: And one who is blessed with the Lord's Glance of Grace - by his words, others are emancipated as well. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਘਲੇ ਆਣੇ ਆਪਿ ਜਿਸੁ ਨਾਹੀ ਦੂਜਾ ਮਤੈ ਕੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: ghale aane aap jis naahee doojaa matai koe |
lines.english: The Lord Himself sends out, and recalls the mortal beings; no one else gives Him advice.

lines.gurmukhi: ਢਾਹਿ ਉਸਾਰੇ ਸਾਜਿ ਜਾਣੈ ਸਭ ਸੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: dtaeh usaare saaj jaanai sabh soe |
lines.english: He Himself demolishes, constructs and creates; He knows everything.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਉ ਨਾਨਕ ਬਖਸੀਸ ਨਦਰੀ ਕਰਮੁ ਹੋਇ ॥੪॥੩॥੫॥
lines.translit: naau naanak bakhasees nadaree karam hoe |4|3|5|
lines.english: O Nanak, the Naam, the Name of the Lord is the blessing, given to those who receive His Mercy, and His Grace. ||4||3||5||
